title: New for 2024
excerpt: Dear Valued Audience: Please be advised that the website for the Manitoba Fiddle Association is currently undergoing a name transformation. The new address for the website is:  ...
bodyHtml:
Dear Valued Audience:

Please be advised that the website for the Manitoba Fiddle Association is currently undergoing a name transformation. The new address for the website is:  www.mbfiddleassociation.org

We are excited about the new year and will be updating the site on a regular basis with news, events, and more! Please check back often to stay informed.

Thank you for your patience and continued interest in preserving fiddling in the province of Manitoba!​

Manitoba Fiddle Association, Inc
